# Jenks Productions

An events company based in Connecticut that hosts 16 live shows per year. The brand is centered around live entertainment experiences, with a consistent and active annual programming schedule.

Source: https://example.com

---

# Live Events That Bring Connecticut Together


### 16 shows every year, one unforgettable community. From family matinees to evening spectaculars, Jenks Productions creates shared experiences that keep audiences coming back season after season.



Get in Touch
Explore Our Shows















## Events & Entertainment, Year-Round


Jenks Productions brings 16 live shows annually to Connecticut, creating memorable experiences for families, enthusiasts, and communities.











### 16 Annual Shows


A consistent, year-round programming schedule you can count on. From spring expos to fall festivals, there's always an event on the horizon.









### Community-First Experiences


Hosted in welcoming Connecticut venues, our shows are built around local connections and shared moments that bring people together.









### Versatile Appeal


From family outings and enthusiast meetups to private event planning, our entertainment events cater to a wide range of audiences and occasions.
















## What Our Community Says


Real stories from families, planners, and repeat attendees who make Jenks Productions part of their year.










Jenks Productions brings the kind of live entertainment that turns a regular weekend into a family tradition. The atmosphere is always welcoming, and you can tell the team genuinely cares about creating a great experience for everyone.


The Martinez Family
Repeat Attendees, Hartford









As an event planner, I've worked with many production companies, but Jenks stands out for their professionalism and consistency. Sixteen shows a year across Connecticut means there's always something fresh on the calendar. Our corporate clients love the polished execution and the genuine warmth of the events.


Sarah Chen
Corporate Event Planner, New Haven









We discovered Jenks Productions last spring and have been to four shows since. The live entertainment is top-notch, and it's become our go-to for date nights and bringing out-of-town guests. You can feel the community spirit at every event.


David & Rachel Kim
Local Residents, Stamford






















## The Heart of Connecticut's Live Events & Entertainment


At Jenks Productions, we believe the best memories are made together. Our 16 annual shows bring the energy of a festival, the warmth of a neighborhood gathering, and the thrill of live performance to venues across the state. From the first note to the final curtain, every event is crafted to surprise, delight, and welcome you back year after year.


- Rotating seasonal themes that keep every visit fresh

- Family-friendly atmospheres with activities for all ages

- Trusted local venues that feel like a second home



Partner With Us








































## Ready to Experience the Show?


From planning your visit to booking entertainment for corporate events, Jenks Productions is here to help. Reach out today and let's make your next event unforgettable.

# Live Events & Entertainment in Connecticut


Jenks Productions brings the energy of live experiences to communities across the state, hosting 16 dynamic shows each year. From family-friendly festivals to niche enthusiast gatherings, our calendar is built on diverse entertainment, consistent quality, and the shared joy of returning audiences who make every event feel like a local tradition.












### 16 Annual Shows


A steady rhythm of events year-round, giving Connecticut audiences something to look forward to in every season.









### Trusted Local Venues


Partnering with well-known Connecticut venues that offer comfortable, accessible spaces for all attendees.









### For Every Audience


Shows designed for families, collectors, hobbyists, and entertainment seekers of all ages and interests.









### Production You Can Count On


Consistent event quality, clear communication, and a professional team behind every single show.












## The Heartbeat of Live Events & Entertainment


From the electric energy of a packed crowd to the quiet anticipation before the curtain rises, each of our 16 annual Connecticut shows is a story waiting to be told. Explore the moments that bring families and communities together, year after year.









Packed crowds, pure energy







Wonder in their eyes







Unforgettable spectacles







Handcrafted ambiance







Shared laughter







Intimate musical moments
















## Our Events & Entertainment Impact


Rooted in Connecticut, we bring live entertainment to life across 16 annual shows, creating trusted experiences for families, planners, and returning audiences year after year.







16

### Annual Shows


A consistent, year-round calendar of live entertainment events across Connecticut.






CT

### Connecticut Based


Proudly local, delivering community-focused entertainment for families and corporate events.






85 %

### Returning Audiences


Trusted by repeat attendees who return for the warm, welcoming atmosphere.






4+

### Event Types & Venues


Versatile programming spanning expos, festivals, and curated live entertainment experiences.

















## Why Families & Planners Keep Coming Back


Jenks Productions delivers 16 dependable live shows each year across Connecticut, creating trusted, family-friendly entertainment that turns first-time visitors into loyal attendees. From welcoming community fairs to polished corporate events, every show is built on consistency, safety, and memorable local experiences.

Plan Your Visit











### Dependable Year-Round Entertainment


With 16 annual shows, attendees can count on Jenks Productions for consistent, quality events that fit any season — from spring expos to holiday festivals.











### Family-Friendly Local Experiences


Every event is designed with all ages in mind, offering safe, welcoming environments where families can create lasting memories close to home.











### Professionally Run Entertainment for Corporate Events


Planners trust Jenks Productions for seamless logistics, broad audience appeal, and polished execution that elevates any corporate or community gathering.

























Bringing communities together through unforgettable live events and entertainment experiences across Connecticut.

## Experience the Magic Behind 16 Live Shows a Year — Jenks Productions

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Meet the passionate team behind Connecticut&#39;s most consistent live entertainment series. Learn why our events &amp; entertainment brand is the go-to for thrilling, memorable experiences. Join our story!

Experience the Magic Behind 16 Live Shows a Year — Jenks Productions






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Events
- About



Contact











# Bringing Connecticut Together, One Show at a Time


At Jenks Productions, we believe that live entertainment is the heartbeat of a vibrant community. For years, we've been the trusted name behind Connecticut's most anticipated events, curating a year-round calendar of 16 unique shows that bring families, friends, and neighbors together under one roof.


Our passion goes beyond just filling a venue. We craft immersive experiences where memories are made, traditions are born, and the simple joy of a shared live moment takes center stage. From the first handshake at the door to the final encore, every detail is designed to make you feel at home.






### Our mission is simple: to create consistent, high-quality entertainment events that our community can count on, season after season.
















## What We Stand For


At Jenks Productions, our events are built on a foundation of warmth, trust, and community. Every show is a chance to create memorable live moments that bring people together.












### Consistency


With 16 live shows each year, our audience knows they can always count on a polished, reliable, and exciting experience. We show up, year after year, with the same dedication to quality.









### Community


We believe live entertainment connects people. Our events are designed to be gathering places where families, friends, and neighbors can share joy and make lasting memories together.









### Warmth


From the moment you arrive, you'll feel the genuine, welcoming atmosphere that defines our brand. We treat every guest like family, ensuring comfort and care are at the heart of every event.









### Professionalism


Behind every seamless show is a team of dedicated experts. We bring decades of entertainment industry experience to Connecticut, ensuring every detail is handled with precision and care.
















## Meet the Team Behind the Magic


Our dedicated crew works year-round to bring 16 unforgettable live shows to Connecticut. Every detail matters, and every smile is our mission.











### Production & Logistics


The driving force behind every seamless show. From stage setup to vendor coordination, our production team ensures that each of our 16 annual events runs smoothly, creating a safe and magical environment for every guest.











### Audience Experience


The heart of our community connection. This team focuses on hospitality, accessibility, and guest satisfaction, turning first-time visitors into lifelong attendees. They ensure every interaction with Jenks Productions feels like coming home.











### Event Coordination


The multitaskers who bring the big picture to life. Our coordinators manage scheduling, artist relations, and on-the-ground troubleshooting, ensuring that every live entertainment experience is delivered with polish and personality.















## What Our Community Says


Year after year, families, friends, and neighbors gather at Jenks Productions events. Here's what keeps them coming back for more live entertainment in Connecticut.














"We've been attending Jenks Productions shows for over five years now. Every season brings something fresh, and the kids absolutely love it. It's become our family tradition—we wouldn't miss a single event. The atmosphere is always so welcoming and well-organized."



The Martinez Family
Regular Attendees, Hartford CT















"As a local business owner in Connecticut, I'm always impressed by how smoothly Jenks Productions runs their events. The community turnout is incredible, and you can tell people genuinely look forward to these shows. It's the kind of local entertainment that makes our town feel connected."



David Chen
Local Business Owner, New Haven CT



















Bringing communities together through unforgettable live events and entertainment experiences across Connecticut.

## Rooted in Connecticut, Open to All


Jenks Productions brings 16 live events each year to familiar venues and community-friendly destinations across the state. Each location is chosen to feel welcoming, accessible, and perfectly suited for families and repeat attendees.






Fairgrounds & Fields



### Outdoor Community Venues


Our signature open-air shows take place at beloved Connecticut fairgrounds, town greens, and festival fields. These spacious settings offer fresh air, room for families to spread out, and that unmistakable local-fair atmosphere that keeps guests returning year after year.

Plan Your Visit  →





Halls & Auditoriums



### Indoor Gathering Spaces


When the seasons shift, our events move into charming community halls, school auditoriums, and local performance spaces. Every indoor venue is selected for its comfortable seating, clear sightlines, and that cozy, neighborly feel that makes a live show truly memorable.

Explore Indoor Shows  →





Parks & Shoreline



### Scenic Destination Settings


Some of our most beloved events unfold in Connecticut's beautiful parks and shoreline locales. These destination-style shows blend live entertainment with a mini-getaway feel — perfect for making a day of it with family and friends against a backdrop of natural New England beauty.

Discover Scenic Shows  →












## Frequently Asked Questions








### How can I inquire about booking or partnering with Jenks Productions?



We love hearing from new collaborators and event hosts. Simply reach out through our contact form or give us a call. Our team typically responds within one business day to discuss your vision and how we can bring it to life.








### Who are your events designed for?



Our live entertainment events are crafted for everyone—families, community members, and corporate groups alike. Whether you're looking for a weekend outing or planning a corporate gathering, our shows create memorable experiences for all ages.








### What types of experiences do you produce?



We specialize in a vibrant mix of live entertainment events including artisan markets, craft fairs, food festivals, and seasonal celebrations. Each year we host 16 unique shows across Connecticut, each with its own distinct personality and community focus.








### How far in advance should I reach out for planning discussions?



We recommend reaching out at least 2-3 months in advance for corporate or large-scale event planning. For vendor applications and community partnerships, we open registration seasonally—joining our mailing list is the best way to stay updated on upcoming opportunities.













## Ready to Plan Your Next Event?


From family-friendly shows to large-scale entertainment events, Jenks Productions brings 16 live experiences to Connecticut every year. Let's start a conversation about how we can make your next gathering unforgettable.



Get in Touch














Bringing communities together through unforgettable live events and entertainment experiences across Connecticut.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Events
- About



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/15/2026



Jenks Productions ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Jenks Productions

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Events
- About



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 15, 2026



Jenks Productions is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Jenks Productions

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Events
- About



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 15, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Jenks Productions

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Events & Entertainment provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Jenks Productions provides Events & Entertainment through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Jenks Productions. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Jenks Productions

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
